name: Turkey Salad Stuffed Eggs
recipeInstructions:
1. Place eggs in a medium-sized saucepan with enough water to cover. Bring to boil, then reduce heat and simmer for 10 minutes. Drain and cool under cold running water. Peel and halve the eggs crosswise. Remove yolks and set aside.
2. Cut celery, green onions, red pepper, and turkey into 1-inch cubes. Place in a food processor and pulse until finely chopped, being careful not to overprocess. Transfer mixture to a medium-sized bowl.
3. Combine mayonnaise, mustard, cider vinegar, sugar, and salt in the bowl with the chopped ingredients. Spoon about one rounded tablespoon of the mixture into each half of the eggs. Serve immediately or refrigerate for up to 12 hours.
